title: Former Brigham and Women’s doctor indicted on 81 new sexual assault charges
author: Abby Patkin
bullets: Crime Dr.
Derrick Todd is accused of performing unnecessary breast and pelvic exams on patients.
He now faces more than 100 sexual assault charges in all.

title: The ‘Mother of the Boston Tea Party’ honored with new Medford statue
author: Samantha Genzer
bullets: Local News A long-overlooked American Revolutionary figure is recognized on Patriots' Day.
A Medford woman credited with playing a key role in the Boston Tea Party was honored Monday with a statue unveiled outside Medford City Hall.

Sarah Bradlee Fulton, often referred to as the “Mother of the Boston Tea Party,” helped disguise participants by painting their faces and concealing their clothing, according to the Boston Tea Party Ships and Museum.

title: Review and setlist: Florence + The Machine delivered a dark, intimate Boston show
author: Autumn Sloboda
bullets: Concert Reviews Florence + The Machine’s rescheduled Boston stop traded arena spectacle for bare feet, huge vocals, and striking intimacy.
Florence Welch of Florence + The Machine.

title: Mike Vrabel issues new statement on Dianna Russini photos, acknowledges ‘difficult conversations’
author: Conor Ryan
bullets: New England Patriots "We believe in order to be successful on and off the field, we have to make good decisions.
That includes me.
That starts with me.

title: Couple runs the Boston Marathon in wedding attire
author: Samantha Genzer
bullets: Boston Marathon “The marathon has always been a very strong part of our relationship.
” Paulina Santoyo (left) and Ryan Foreman (right) pose at the Boston Marathon.
Courtesy of Paulina Santoyo The Boston Marathon is known for its sea of colorful racing gear — but one couple still managed to stand out.

title: POST decertifies former Brandeis officer accused of negligence in student’s 2023 death
author: Abby Patkin
bullets: Local News Kimberly Carter is accused of mishandling a report of someone lying in the woods where sophomore Eli Stuart was ultimately found unresponsive hours later.
The campus of Brandeis University in November 2023.

Erin Clark / The Boston Globe, File By Abby Patkin April 21, 2026 | 12:37 PM 2 minutes to read Massachusetts police oversight officials have permanently decertified a former Brandeis University officer named in a wrongful death lawsuit brought by the family of a student who died by suicide on campus in 2023.

title: Watch: Noah Kahan makes his NPR Tiny Desk debut ahead of new album release
author: Heather Alterisio
bullets: Music A look at the singer-songwriter's X (Twitter) history reveals years of manifesting this very moment.
With the release of his fourth studio album “The Great Divide” just days away, singer-songwriter and New England native Noah Kahan made his NPR Tiny Desk Concert debut Tuesday.
“Been waiting my whole life for this,” Kahan shared via an Instagram story Monday.

title: Quincy resident plans to buy a house and car after $4M scratch ticket win
author: Samantha Genzer
bullets: Local News The ticket was purchased at Richdale Food Shops in Rockland.
Peixia Du of Quincy Massachusetts State Lottery ShareSend this article to your social connections.
A Quincy resident recently won $4 million on a scratch ticket she brought at Richdale Food Shops, the Massachusetts State Lottery announced Friday.

title: A significant Green Line shutdown starts Wednesday
author: Samantha Genzer
bullets: Local News An MBTA suspension between Kenmore and Boston College will bring shuttle buses and reduced service through April 30.
People board shuttle buses to Back Bay during a past Green Line service suspension.
Shuttle buses will be offered during the April 22-30 suspension.

title: Here’s the ‘ascending prospect’ the Patriots are projected to take in the NFL Draft
author: Hayden Bird
bullets: Morning Sports Update "Iheanachor is a mauler with the size, strength and athleticism to flourish as a heavy-handed right tackle.
" Max Iheanachor runs the 40-yard dash at the NFL rookie combine.
He is projected as a possible Patriots pick in recent mock drafts.
